message:
fix(ready): molecule steps appear in bd ready, remove stale filtering (GH#1359)

The old SQLite backend filtered issues with -mol- or -wisp- in their IDs
from GetReadyWork results. This was removed with the SQLite backend, but
the IncludeMolSteps field in WorkFilter and associated comments remained
as dead code. Clean up the stale field and add a regression test
confirming molecule steps correctly appear in bd ready.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
